since_last: 51% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +3.58%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.31% · Gold +1.34% · Nasdaq100 -0.72%. 51% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +3.58%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +3.58%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -7.83%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +6.31%, PUBM +5.04%, MGNI +4.65%, DDOG +4.43%, DV +4.32%. Laggards: TER -7.83%, HPE -5.63%, VRT -4.52%, KLAC -4.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.63% at $152.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
